2606.14119.title: FactoryLLM: A Safe and Open-Source AI Playground for Evaluating LLMs in Smart Factories
2606.14119.paper_summary: Fault diagnostics and recovery in smart factories is challenging because critical information is dispersed across manuals of multiple machines which are interconnected through the manufacturing process. Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide a promising approach. In this paper, we propose FactoryLLM, a safe and open-source AI playground designed for evaluating different LLM-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) models by analysing documents from multiple machines across the manufacturing process. FactoryLLM enables the user to configure the LLM, and assess performance when reasoning over multiple documents, through a dual evaluation setup using both RAGAS and NVIDIA's LLM-as-a-Judge metrics. FactoryLLM is safe because it allows users to run local or open-source LLMs without sharing sensitive industrial data, providing a controlled environment for experimentation. We demonstrate the efficacy of FactoryLLM through a case study which involves an Autonomous Intelligent Vehicle and its Mobile Planner software, evaluating three LLMs across 30 maintenance queries derived from approximately 600 pages of cross-machine documentation. The results suggest that FactoryLLM is effective in cross-machine document reasoning: every model achieved a groundedness score above 0.88. The full code and documentation for community to test FactoryLLM with their manufacturing specific scenarios are publicly available.
2606.14119.paper_summary_zh: 故障診斷和恢復在智慧工廠中具有挑戰性，因為關鍵資訊分散在多台機器的手冊中，這些機器通過製造過程互相連接。大型語言模型（LLMs）可以提供一種有前景的方法。在本文中，我們提出了FactoryLLM，這是一個安全且開源的AI遊樂場，旨在通過分析來自製造過程中多台機器的文件來評估不同基於LLM的檢索增強生成（RAG）模型。FactoryLLM使使用者能夠配置LLM，並在多文件推理時評估性能，通過使用RAGAS和NVIDIA的LLM-as-a-Judge指標的雙重評估設置。FactoryLLM是安全的，因為它允許用戶運行本地或開源的LLM，而無需共享敏感的工業數據，提供了一個受控的實驗環境。我們通過一個案例研究展示了FactoryLLM的有效性，該研究涉及一個自主智能車輛及其移動規劃軟體，評估了三個LLM在大約600頁跨機器文檔中衍生的30個維護查詢的表現。結果表明，FactoryLLM在跨機器文檔推理方面是有效的：每個模型的基礎分數均超過0.88。完整的代碼和文檔可供社區在其特定製造場景中測試FactoryLLM，並已公開提供。
2606.14119.author: Yash Pulse et.al.
2606.14119.authors: Yash Pulse, Yong-Bin Kang, Abhik Banerjee, Abdur Forkan, Prem Prakash Jayaraman
